ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Vegetable & Lentil Sauce (50%) (Water, Carrots, Swede, Mushrooms, Tomato Chopped (Tomatoes, Tomato Juice, Citric Acid), Leeks, Onion, Dark Speckled Lentils (2%), Tomato Purée, Mushroom Stock [Rehydrated Mushroom (Mushroom Concentrate, Water, Mushroom Powder), Salt, Cornflour], Cornflour, Rapeseed Oil, Garlic Purée, Agave Syrup, Caramel Paste (Glucose Syrup, Water), Thyme Dried, Sage Dried, Black Pepper Ground). Root Vegetable Mash (50%) (Sweet Potato 45%, Potato 39%, Carrot 15%, Salt, White Pepper).
